ddls:
CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the design belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the design (e.g., draft, in review, approved) */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date the design was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the design */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the design */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date the design was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design parameter */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the design parameter (e.g., wingwall flare angle, top edge bevel) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the design parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the parameter is critical for the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_parameters_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the result belongs to */,
  "ke" REAL /* Kinetic energy (KE) of the simulation */,
  "sr" REAL /* Stream power ratio (SR) of the simulation */,
  "a" REAL /* Flow area (A) of the simulation */,
  "bs" REAL /* Backwater slope (BS) of the simulation */,
  "c" REAL /* Chezy coefficient (C) of the simulation */,
  "dip" REAL /* Depth to invert at dip (DIP) of the simulation */,
  "ee" REAL /* Energy loss (EE) of the simulation */,
  "f" REAL /* Froude number (F) of the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., steady-state, transient) */,
  "simulation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the simulation */,
  "simulation_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the simulation results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date of the last activity in the collaboration */,
  "last_activity_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_last_activity_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_activity_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been resolved */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the task belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "task" TEXT /* Text of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "assigner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the task */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date the task was completed */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_completed_by FOREIGN KEY ("completed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigner_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagrams" (
  "diagram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagram */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the diagram belongs to */,
  "diagram_file" TEXT /* File containing the diagram */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the diagram */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagram */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the diagram */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the diagram was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date the diagram was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the diagram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagrams_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagrams_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagrams_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the note is private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date the note was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
